notes: This rerun used the validation-only routes on port 3102: POST /diagnostics/runtime/degraded_state and POST /diagnostics/runtime/provider_failure where applicable.
Do not use the older /__validation/degraded-state path for this milestone.
Prewarm evidence was judged against the current single declared target simple_price_bitcoin_usd, per orchestrator instructions.
